1701700.name: Omno (Official Soundtrack)
1701700.description:
The official soundtrack to OMNO, composed and produced by award-winning composer Benedict Nichols (The Falconeer, Before We Leave).

Enter into the musical experience of OMNO.

Allow its waves of gentle euphoria to wash over you with its poignent melodies, rhythmic voices and melanchoic blend of solo voices, ethnic instruments and orchestra. Surf the dunes, float through the clouds, and be at peace with the world which welcomes you.
